title: iris sofarana subsp. kasruwana
intro: Iris sofarana subsp. kasruwana, also known as the Kasruwana Iris, is a subspecies of the Iris sofarana plant, a type of flowering plant in the iris family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Iris sofarana subsp. kasruwana include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
